bird.name: 棕榈鸦
bird.summary: 棕榈鸦（学名：Corvus palmarum），是鸦科鸦属的一种，分布于古巴、多米尼加共和国和海地。 参考文献

locations.name: 常綠森林
locations.summary: 常綠森林是由常綠樹木組成的森林。它們出現在廣泛的氣候帶中，包括寒冷氣候中的針葉樹和冬青樹等樹木，溫帶地區的桉樹、活橡樹、金合歡和班克樹，以及熱帶地區的雨林樹木。針葉溫帶常綠森林最常以科中的物種為主。樹木包括：松科和柏科。闊葉溫帶常綠森林包…

relations.subject: 棕榈鸦
relations.evidence: It primarily inhabits pine forest in the island's mountains but also occurs in evergreen forest in the lowlands of Haiti and in dry to humid deciduous forest in both countries

relations.subject: 棕榈鸦
relations.evidence: "On Hispaniola, its decline is a result of widespread forest clearance for agriculture and probably also hunting for food (it is reputedly a delicacy) and sport
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
